description: 东方美学，庄重诗意。飞天飘带、卷轴叙事、矿物质颜料感。
base_style_prompt: Dunhuang mural style. Ochre base (#D4A574), stone blue (#2E86AB), vermillion (#C53D43), stone green (#5DAE8B), gold (#C4A35A). Scroll narrative from left to right across 4 stages. Flying apsaras with elegant ribbons unite the composition. Graceful figures inspired by Dunhuang art (NOT direct Buddhist imagery). Auspicious clouds, lotus flowers, gold frame borders. Mineral pigment quality — slightly matte, not digital bright.
